chain.thought: Explanation: The highest rated (best) position in the table is 2nd. She placed 2nd in 2001, 2002, 2008, 2009, and 2012. The most recent of these is 2012.

judge_thought: Explanation: The highest-rated (best) position she achieved in the table is 2nd place. She placed 2nd in 2001 (European Junior Championships), 2002 (World Junior Championships), 2008 (World Athletics Final), 2009 (World Student Games), and 2012 (European Championships). The most recent year among these is 2012.
